rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 3×3 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. A player's first stone may be placed on any empty cell. After that player's first stone, a placement is legal only if it is orthogonally adjacent to a friendly component and either it lies outside the pre-move bounding rectangle of at least one such component or it is adjacent to at least two distinct friendly components under that relation. Player 0 wins by connecting the top and bottom edges with one orthogonally connected group; Player 1 wins by connecting the left and right edges with one orthogonally connected group. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
